project: Crônica de Aethelgard: O Destino das Cinzas
art_style_master_guidelines: AAA RPG inventory icon and guild emblem concept art, intricate metallic filigree, glowing runic details, dark velvet/stone background, high realism.

items.name: Espada Longa Real de Eldor
items.composition: Ornate medieval longsword resting on dark aged leather. Polished steel blade with central fuller, crossguard inlaid with royal crimson enamel and silver filigree, wire-wrapped leather grip.

items.name: Peitoral Rúnico de Valen
items.composition: Intricate mage armor chestpiece crafted from reinforced dark leather and polished steel plates set with glowing blue Aether crystals along the collar and sternum.

items.name: Elixir Draconiano Ancestral
items.composition: An antique crystal flask stoppered with wax and gold wire, filled with swirling, bioluminescent golden-orange liquid that emits small glowing sparks inside the glass.

guilds.name: A Ordem dos Lâminas de Ferro
guilds.composition: Ornate metallic guild crest: Two crossed heavy broadswords over a battered iron anvil surrounded by a steel laurel wreath on a dark charcoal background.

guilds.name: O Círculo Arcano de Valen
guilds.composition: Ornate arcane crest: A glowing sapphire-blue eye inside an astrolabe ring of silver runes and orbital spheres on a deep indigo velvet background.

guilds.name: A Irmandade do Corvo Sombrio
guilds.composition: Ornate shadow crest: A sleek obsidian raven skull holding a poisoned silver dagger in its beak, surrounded by dark shadow mist on pitch black.

guilds.name: O Sindicato Áureo das Rotas
guilds.composition: Ornate merchant crest: A golden balance scale holding a diamond and a bar of gold bullion, framed by wheat sheaves and coins on rich burgundy.

guilds.name: O Pacto das Asas de Escama
guilds.composition: Ornate dragon tamer crest: A majestic golden dragon wing wrapping around a silver sword, surrounded by glowing celestial stars on alpine white-blue.
